descriptionHtml: Ditch those ordinary veggie straws made of empty potato starch fillers. You deserve a snack that heroes your crunch with real yellow pea, brown rice, cassava, and sweet potato. Experience an impossibly light crunch and heart-healthy, anti-inflammatory fats that crush your flavor goals without compromise.

Crispy, salty, and incredibly "munchable," our Organic Rice Cake Minis are the ultimate guilt-free snack. Made in Richvale, CA, with just three clean ingredients, these bite-sized rounds deliver a satisfying crunch that keeps both kids and parents happy.

Whether you’re power-snacking through a busy day or looking for the perfect vessel for your favorite dip during a movie marathon, these minis are built for the task.

These sun-dried, unsulphured, and organic apricots have no added sugar or preservatives. They offer a naturally sweet, rich flavor in convenient 1.76 oz pouches, making them perfect for healthy on-the-go snacking.

descriptionHtml:
A plant-based, whole-food energy bar combining organic Medjool dates, tahini, unsweetened blueberries, and lemon peel. This nutritious snack features a refreshing, tart-and-sweet flavor profile, designed for clean energy without added sugars, seed oils, or gluten. It is vegan, nut-free, and soy-free.

Ingredients: organic medjool dates, tahini (ground hulled sesame seeds), unsweetened dried blueberries, organic pumpkin seeds, organic sunflower seeds, lemon peel, ginger, sea salt

descriptionHtml:
Experience a "sweet heat" classic reimagined for the modern athlete and the mindful snacker. Natural Endurance™ Sweet Chili Protein Chips deliver that legendary bold flavor you crave, but with a serious nutritional upgrade. Whether you're fueling up for a workout or powering through a busy afternoon, these chips prove that you don't have to choose between a satisfying crunch and your fitness goals.

Proudly crafted in Piscataway, NJ, we’ve traded the deep fryer for air-popped technology to ensure every bite is light, airy, and popped to perfection.
title: Sweet Chili Protein Chips

descriptionHtml:
Forget the tough, leathery dried fruit of the past. Fruit Bliss Organic Turkish Mini Figs are a revelation in snacking. We start with sun-ripened organic figs from the hills of Turkey and use a unique rehydration process—adding just a touch of water—to bring them back to a juicy, tender, "blissful" state.

Proudly dried and packed in Brooklyn, NY, these mini figs are the ultimate clean-label snack for those who want dessert-level sweetness straight from the vine.
title: Mini Figs

descriptionHtml: Enjoy the unique, nutty flavor of these roasted sweet apricot kernels. A perfect crunchy snack that is both grain-free and low in natural sugar.

descriptionHtml:
Experience the perfect pop of summer flavor in every bite. Our Freeze-Dried Sweet Corn takes everything you love about fresh-off-the-cob taste and transforms it into a light, airy, and irresistibly crunchy snack.

By removing the moisture while locking in the nutrients, we’ve created a versatile pantry staple that’s as "farm-fresh" as it is convenient. Whether you need a healthy crunch on the go or a flavor boost for your favorite recipes, this corn delivers. Freeze-dried in Westley, CA
title: Just Corn

descriptionHtml:
It’s the nostalgic flavor of a warm peanut butter cookie, reimagined for your active lifestyle. Our Peanut Butter Cookie bar proves that you don't need a long list of ingredients to achieve perfection. With just three simple, whole-food components, we’ve captured that "straight-from-the-oven" magic in a moist, chewy treat that requires zero baking.

Simple, salty, and satisfyingly sweet—it’s the ultimate clean-label indulgence. Crafted in Denver, CO
title: Peanut Butter Cookie Bar

descriptionHtml:
It’s the flavor pairing that never goes out of style. Our Freeze-Dried Strawberry & Banana mix brings together the tart sweetness of sun-ripened strawberries and the creamy mellow notes of bananas in one light, airy crunch.

By freeze-drying these fruits right at their peak in Westley, CA, we’ve captured all the vibrant nutrients and intense flavors without adding a single grain of sugar. It’s nature’s candy, evolved.
title: Just Strawberries N' Bananas

descriptionHtml:
Indulge in a rich, fudgy experience that feels like a decadent brownie but performs like a superfood powerhouse. Crafted in Denver, CO, our Dark Chocolate & Tart Cherry bar balances the deep, complex notes of 100% Fair Trade cacao with the bright tang of organic red tart cherries.

With a base of buttery Medjool dates and a crunch of chia seeds and almonds, this is the "differential" in clean snacking: sophisticated flavor without a single drop of added sugar or seed oils.
title: Cherry + Cacao Bar

ingredients
organic figs, organic dates, organic sunflower butter (organic roasted sunflower seeds), organic shelled hemp seeds, organic raspberries, organic chia seeds, organic lemon powder, sea salt
about the brand
Since the beginning, Bearded Brothers has handcrafted its bars in its own kitchen. Their team thinks the best way to make the highest-quality product is to make sure it's done right by those that care most. They’re meticulous and dedicated to ensuring that every product is made with the care, and they focuses on clean, simple, organic, and truly delicious. They use the “good stuff” so we can feel good about what we’re eating.

descriptionHtml:
Elevate your snacking with the exquisite taste of Nutruit’s Roasted Lentils. We’ve taken the humble Mediterranean lentil and transformed it into a gourmet, high-protein treat that hits all the right notes: a satisfying crunch, a hint of earthiness, and a bold finish.

Seasoned with the mineral-rich punch of Pink Himalayan Salt and the sharp kick of freshly ground black pepper, these lentils are more than just a snack—they are fuel for the health-conscious individual who refuses to compromise on flavor.
title: Salt & Pepper Roasted Lentils

descriptionHtml: An organic, nutrient-dense snack featuring California walnuts that are germinated in water and dehydrated for a superior crunch. Lightly sweetened with maple syrup, cinnamon, maca, and sea salt, this vegan, gluten-free, and Paleo-friendly snack is crafted for enhanced digestibility, offering a healthy alternative to candy.

descriptionHtml:
A premium, kettle-cooked snack made with only three ingredients: heirloom non-GMO sweet potatoes, heart-healthy avocado oil, and sea salt. They offer a savory, crunchy, and slightly sweet taste profile, catering to health-conscious consumers with a vegan, gluten-free, and top-9 allergen-free formula.
Ingredients: sweet potatoes, avocado oil, sea salt

descriptionHtml:
Imagine the velvety, nutty decadence of a premium creamy pistachio gelato—now capture that essence in a snack that actually fuels your day. If that sounds like a dream, it’s time to drop the spoon and pick up our Pistachio Chocolate Puff-Crispy Bar.

Crafted in the heart of New York, NY, this bar isn’t just a treat; it’s a masterclass in texture and plant-based nutrition. We’ve layered the crunch of pea protein and quinoa crisps with silky almond butter and rich unsweetened chocolate to create a snack that is as sophisticated as a patisserie dessert but as functional as a protein shake.
title: Pistachio Chocolate Puff-Crispy Bar

descriptionHtml:
100% plant-based, gluten-free, and vegan-friendly, featuring 14g of protein and less than 1g of sugar per bar. The bar is described as a "fudgier-than-ever" treat with a chewy chocolate center, topped with high-protein cocoa crispies and coated in smooth dark chocolate, offering a rich cocoa flavor and a soft, chewy texture
Ingredients: vegan proteins (soy protein isolate, pea protein isolate), glycerin, maltitol, oligofructose, cacao fat, sunflower oil, unsweetened chocolate, water, natural flavors, rice flour, soluble maize fiber, cocoa, tapioca starch, cocoa (processed with alkali), lecithins, xanthan gum
title: Brownie Batter Protein Bar

descriptionHtml:
Rich, buttery, and irresistibly smooth—these salted macadamia nuts deliver a melt-in-your-mouth crunch with just the right touch of sea salt. Each bite is indulgent yet clean, offering a naturally creamy texture that feels both elevated and deeply satisfying.

Sourced from regenerative farms and simply crafted with just organic macadamia nuts and salt, GoodSAM keeps the ingredient list beautifully minimal while letting the bold, natural flavor shine. Dry roasted to enhance their signature richness, these nutrient-dense nuts provide healthy fats, fiber, and essential minerals—making them as nourishing as they are delicious. Clean, craveable, and effortlessly premium, this is snacking at its most refined.

Roasted in Darien, CT
title: Dry Roasted & Salted Macadamia Nuts

descriptionHtml: Experience superfood snacking at its peak. Processed and packaged in Los Angeles, CA, this blend takes freshly picked strawberries and bananas and transforms them into a crispy, light, and nutrient-dense snack. By removing over 90% of the water through a specialized vacuum process, we lock in the vibrant flavor and essential vitamins without adding a single preservative.
title: Strawberry & Banana Crisps

descriptionHtml:
Indulge in the cozy, nostalgic flavor of a freshly baked oatmeal chocolate chip cookie—reimagined as a clean, energizing snack. This chewy, chocolate-studded protein bar delivers the perfect balance of wholesome oats and rich cocoa sweetness in every bite.

Crafted with real, plant-based ingredients like dates, gluten-free oats, and chocolate chips, it’s a satisfying treat that fuels your day without weighing you down. With a boost of protein and fiber to keep you full and energized, this bar is as nourishing as it is delicious—proof that better-for-you snacks don’t have to compromise on flavor.

Ingredients: dates, sunflower seeds, brown rice protein isolate, chocolate chips (chocolate, cocoa butter, coconut sugar), gluten-free oats, resistant starch fiber blend (cassava flour, green banana powder, Jerusalem artichoke powder, chicory root, upcycled dried apple flour), chia seeds, sunflower lecithin, vitamin E, Himalayan salt, chocolate flavor

descriptionHtml:
Sweet, sun-ripened pineapple—transformed into a chewy, tropical treat that’s bursting with natural flavor. Each strip delivers a bright, juicy sweetness with a satisfying texture that feels indulgent, yet refreshingly simple.

Made with just one ingredient—pure organic pineapple—Solely
 strips everything back to what matters most: real fruit, nothing else. No added sugar, preservatives, or artificial ingredients—just gently crafted fruit that locks in flavor and nutrients for a clean, naturally energizing snack. Perfectly portable and effortlessly wholesome, it’s fruit in its most delicious, on-the-go form.

Ingredients: organic pineapple

descriptionHtml: "Smoke Shack" is our unique creation and our absolute pride and joy. Born and Crunched in New York, NY, we set out on a mission to capture that iconic, robust BBQ flavor without the mountain of added sugar found in traditional snacks. After perfecting countless versions, we finally landed on this savory masterpiece.
title: Smoke Shack Crunchy Yellow Peas

descriptionHtml:
Rich, fudgy chocolate meets creamy peanut butter in a perfectly balanced, melt-in-your-mouth bite that tastes as indulgent as your favorite dessert—without the guilt. Soft, chewy, and naturally sweet, this bar delivers that classic chocolate-peanut butter combo in its purest, most satisfying form.

Made with just a handful of real, organic ingredients—like dates, peanuts, cacao, and chia seeds—this bar keeps things refreshingly simple and clean. JONESBAR focuses on whole-food nutrition with no added sugar or fillers, letting the natural flavors shine through. Packed with fiber and plant-based protein, it’s a wholesome, energy-boosting snack that proves simple ingredients can still deliver big, crave-worthy flavor.

Crafted in Manasquan, NJ
title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Bar

descriptionHtml: See for yourself what sets our Sea Salt Crackers apart. Crafted in Los Angeles, CA, these crackers are a masterclass in gluten-free innovation. We’ve combined wholesome, grain-free flours with a satisfying crunch that holds up to any topping. Eat them bare or with a dip if you dare—both ways are extraordinary!
title: Sea Salt Crackers

descriptionHtml: Fuel your day with a crunch that gives back. Crafted in the heart of Corte Madera, CA, these organic protein snacks are designed for those who demand more from their pantry. We’ve ditched the junk and focused on a plant-based powerhouse of peas, beans, and brown rice to keep you satisfied without the "snack regret."

descriptionHtml:
A plant-based,, gluten-free, and vegan snack featuring a light, airy texture with 10g of protein. It blends creamy peanut butter, rich Peruvian dark chocolate, and crunchy pea crisps with quinoa to provide a nutritious (~170 calories) and satisfying crunch.

Ingredients: pea protein crisps (pea protein, rice starch), organic tapioca syrup, organic dark chocolate (organic cane sugar, organic chocolate liquor, organic cocoa butter, organic vanilla powder), peanut butter, vegetable glycerine, prebiotic soluble tapioca fiber, organic quinoa crisps (organic quinoa), pea protein, organic tapioca syrup solids, peanuts, tapioca fiber, natural flavor, sea salt, sunflower lecithin.

descriptionHtml:
This pretzel bites back with a little bit of heat! We’ve landed on the perfect, family-friendly balance of spice for a light, wholesome sizzle that you’ll surely want to invite to your next game day shindig. And if you find yourself absolutely addicted, don’t worry, they won’t set your tongue ablaze! Spiced to perfection, this out of the ordinary twist is just a bit picante with a zesty combination of peppers and herbs that zing for a subtle fiery finish.

descriptionHtml:
The perfect pretzel for everyone! Like the best friend you can always count on….dependable and trusted, these Sea Salt twists are the perfect pretzel for everyone! Top 9 allergen free and certified gluten free means no worrying when you grab this snack. And no matter where or when you open a bag, these No Grainer twists are sure to satisfy every crunchy, salty craving. Made with gut-friendly cassava flour. 

Ingredients: cassava flour, potato starch, palm fruit oil, tapioca starch, faba bean protein, tapioca syrup, salt, milled flax, sunflower lecithin

Nutrition Data: Calories: 190, Carbs: 33g, Protein: 1g, Fiber: 1g, Saturated Fat: 2.5g, Total Sugar: 1g, Added Sugar: 1g, Sodium: 500mg
title: Sea Salt Grain-Free Pretzels

descriptionHtml:
Simple, savory, and irresistibly crunchy—these roasted chickpeas prove that less really can be more. Lightly dusted with sea salt, each bite delivers a clean, satisfying crunch that keeps you reaching back for just one more handful.

Made with just a few real ingredients—chickpeas, heart-healthy oil, and sea salt—this snack is as straightforward as it is nourishing. Packed with plant-based protein and fiber to help keep you full and energized, it’s a better-for-you alternative to traditional salty snacks without sacrificing flavor or texture. Crisp, craveable, and effortlessly wholesome—this is snacking, simplified.

Ingredients: chickpeas, expeller-pressed high oleic sunflower or safflower oil, sea salt

Nutrition Data: Calories: 140, Carbs: 20g, Protein: 8g, Fiber: 8g, Saturated Fat: 0g, Total Sugar: 1g, Added Sugar: 0g, Sodium: 230mg

Crafted in Boston, MA
title: Sea Salt Chickpea Snack

descriptionHtml: Poppable, plant-based, and peanut buttery? Now that sounds like a delicious mouthful. Nut buttered in San Francisco, CA, these bites are the ultimate functional snack for your most active days. We’ve combined a chewy, superfood-packed outer shell with a creamy, protein-rich center to create a portable snack that tastes like a treat but performs like fuel.
title: Oatmeal Raisin Peanut Butter Bites
[Direct] Oat Milk Latte Nitro Cold Brew Coffee

descriptionHtml: Crispy, golden, and satisfyingly classic—these potato crisps deliver that familiar, can’t-stop crunch you know and love, with a cleaner, feel-good twist. Light, airy, and perfectly salted, each bite brings simple comfort and undeniable snack-time nostalgia.
title: Classic Potato Crisps

descriptionHtml: Four of our most popular snacks from our 60+ total options to keep you healthy and energized for one flight, road trip, or busy day on the move. Each four-snack combination contains approximately 700 calories, 22 grams of plant protein, and 17 grams of fiber.
title: Pilot Nutritionist + airfare 4-snack sampler

descriptionHtml: Indulge in the delicate, buttery flavor of baby pistachio kernels. These premium Afghan nuts are roasted to perfection with just a touch of salt, offering a high-protein, grain-free, and peanut-free snack.
title: Baby Pistachio Kernels

descriptionHtml:
Warm, golden, and perfectly spiced—these turmeric-kissed cashews deliver a bold, savory crunch with every bite. A subtle heat from chili and pepper meets bright citrus notes, creating a rich, layered flavor that’s both comforting and energizing.

Air-roasted and wrapped in their natural skin for extra crunch, these cashews bring more than just taste—they’re packed with fiber, antioxidants, and plant-based nutrition. A vibrant blend of turmeric, lime, and spices transforms this simple snack into something truly crave-worthy—clean, satisfying, and full of feel-good flavor.

Ingredients: cashews, sea salt, lime powder, chili powder, pepper powder, pepper extract, chili extract, turmeric powder

Nutrition Data: Calories: 160, Carbs: 9g, Protein: 4g, Fiber: 3g, Saturated Fat: 2.5g, Total sugar: 1g, Added sugar: 0g, Sodium: 210mg

Wrapped in Dublin, CA
title: Golden Turmeric Wrapped Cashews

descriptionHtml:
Bright, zesty, and irresistibly crunchy—these lime-kissed cashews bring a refreshing twist to everyday snacking. Each bite delivers a bold citrus pop balanced with savory notes, making it impossible to stop at just one.

Air-roasted to perfection and wrapped in their natural skin for extra crunch, these cashews pack both flavor and function. A tangy blend of lime, sea salt, and subtle onion creates a uniquely craveable taste, while the minimally processed ingredients keep things clean and satisfying. With plant-based protein, fiber, and healthy fats, this is a snack that feels as good as it tastes—fresh, vibrant, and ready to energize your day.

Ingredients: cashews, onion, sea salt, lime powder, natural onion extract

Nutrition Data: Calories: 160, Carbs: 9g, Protein: 4g, Fiber: 3g, Saturated Fat: 2.5g, Total sugar: 1g, Added sugar: 0g, Sodium: 200mg

Wrapped in Dublin, CA
title: Lime Twist Wrapped Cashews

descriptionHtml: Experience a "Great Crunch" with a conscience. Wrapped and perfected in Dublin, CA, these aren't your typical roasted cashews. By retaining their natural skin—the "wrap"—we preserve the nut’s nutritional integrity and deliver a unique, satisfying texture that sets a new standard for snacking.
title: Sea Salt Wrapped Cashews

descriptionHtml:
What’s better than a PB+J sandwich? A PB+J jonesbar that tastes exactly like the childhood classic but is made with only five real, organic ingredients. Handmade in Manasquan, NJ, these bars are designed for those who want to get back to the basics without sacrificing flavor.

One bite, and you'll understand why this is the bar that turns snackers into subscribers. Welcome to the simple life!
title: PB and J Bar

descriptionHtml: Get ready for a snack that’s as bold as it is nutritious. "Krunched" in Middleton, MA, these aren't your average kale chips. We take organic kale and drench it in a creamy, savory glaze made from cashews, tahini, and red bell peppers, then dehydrate it to perfection to preserve every bit of plant-based goodness.
title: Spicy Kale Chips

descriptionHtml:
Creamy, savory, and deeply satisfying—these sour cream and onion kale chips take a classic flavor and elevate it into something bold and crave-worthy. Each bite delivers a rich, tangy coating with a hearty, ultra-crunchy texture that feels indulgent yet surprisingly light.

Made from organic kale and a nourishing blend of nuts and seeds, these chips are carefully dehydrated to lock in both flavor and nutrients—resulting in a thicker, more satisfying crunch than traditional chips. Earthy Krunchy
 keeps things clean and simple with vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free ingredients, while still delivering that nostalgic sour cream and onion taste you love. Packed with plant-based protein and real, whole-food ingredients, this is comfort snacking—reimagined in its healthiest, most delicious form.

Ingredients: organic kale, organic sunflower seeds, organic cashews, lemon juice, onions, scallions, tahini (ground sesame seeds), organic apple cider vinegar, nutritional yeast, onion powder, garlic powder,  hemp seeds, sea salt

Nutrition Data: Calories: 160, Carbs: 13g, Protein: 9g, Fiber: 4g, Saturated Fat: 1g, Total Sugar: 3g, Added Sugar: 0g, Sodium: 105mg

Krunched in Middleton, MA
title: Sour Cream and Onion Kale Chips

descriptionHtml:
Discover Tropical Bliss with every bite of our sprouted Coconut Crusted Cashews!

Hand-crafted with just three simple ingredients - sprouted cashews, organic dates, and shredded coconut - each cashew delivers a perfect balance of sweet and crunch that transports you to a sun-drenched paradise.
title: Sprouted Coconut-Crusted Cashews

descriptionHtml: From a humble kitchen in Walpole, MA, to a leader in plant-based innovation, Healthy Truth remains committed to one mission: creating the most delicious, honest snacks on the planet. These sprouted almonds are the result of endless experimentation and a refusal to use refined sugars, fillers, or anything processed.
title: Sprouted Salt & Vinegar Almonds

descriptionHtml:
Raw Sprouted Pizzalmond helps satisfy your pizza cravings! Sprouted nuts are a part of the Raw Vegan Diet and amplify the nutrient density of the nut. Fan-favorite for kids and adults alike Good source of fiber Rich in heart-healthy monounsaturated fats Nutrient-dense High in Vitamin E. Enjoy one every day of the week (without the guilt) with our Sprouted Pizzalmonds! They’re handcrafted with love & made with simple, real ingredients like sundried tomatoes, dates, bell pepper & basil. Go ahead & take a slice for yourself…they’re sure to satisfy your pizza cravings!

Ingredients: organic sprouted almonds, organic dates, organic sun-dried tomatoes, organic onion organic oregano, organic fennel, organic basil, organic garlic, organic chili flakes, organic parsley, organic thyme, pink crystal salt, organic garlic, organic onion

Nutrition Data: Calories: 210, Carbs: 10g, Protein: 7g, Fiber: 4g, Saturated Fat: 1.5g, Total Sugar: 4g, Added Sugar: 0g, Sodium: 77mg
title: Sprouted Pizzalmonds

descriptionHtml: Unlock the synergistic power of nature’s most potent seeds. Crafted in Orange County, CA, our Three Seeds Bar is a functional powerhouse designed specifically to support your immune system and promote radiant skin health. It’s a clean-label solution for those who want their snacks to work as hard as they do.
title: Three Seeds Bar

descriptionHtml: A plant-based, paleo-friendly energy bar featuring a rich, brownie-like texture with roasted hazelnut and coffee notes. Made with whole ingredients like dates, cacao, and superfood maca root, it offers 5mg of caffeine per 1.7 oz bar for a clean energy boost without added sugars, gluten, or soy.
title: Hazelnut Coffee Maca Bar

descriptionHtml:
Looking for a healthy snack that's both delicious and nutritious?

Experience the vibrant tropical flavor of perfectly ripened mangoes in every chewy, sweet bite. Our organic dried mangoes are naturally sweet with no added sugar, preserving the fruit's bright flavor and nutritional benefits in a convenient, anytime treat - making it a great alternative to traditional sugary snacks! 

100% organic whole fruit
Soft, chewy, sweet & just a tad tart
Packed with antioxidants
No added sugar or preservatives
No sulfites or additives
Naturally sweet and satisfying
Certified organic, gluten-free, and vegan

Ingredients: organic dried mango slices

descriptionHtml: For the sweet and smoky fans, this bag brings warm flavor in every crunch. Honey BBQ has that sweet-meets-smoke taste you want from our signature chickpea hearts. Great as a snack, and even better as a topping on bowls, wraps, or roasted veggies. Grab a bag and enjoy the sweet smoky taste.
title: Honey BBQ Garbanzo Hearts

descriptionHtml:
This is a classic protein bar loved by almost everyone. Rich and creamy cookie dough, with whole chocolate chips and crunchy protein puffs. if you are a fan of chocolate chip cookies, let us hep you get your fix on the daily in guilt free fashion. Plus, it includes 3 grams of creatine for boosting muscle energy, accelerating post-workout recovery, and enhancing cognitive performance.

 

Crafted in New York, NY
title: Cookie Dough Dazzler Daily Bar

descriptionHtml:
Gourmet artichokes quarters on the go! These are sustainably grown, diligently harvested, and steamed to maintain its freshness and silky texture. And they are made with only simple and clean ingredients, steamed and lightly marinated with basil, thyme, and extra virgin olive oil.

 

Marinated in Miami, FL
title: Basil & Thyme Marinated Artichokes
